example_prompt: Send money to a mobile money account (Wave, Orange Money, MTN Money, etc.) as a single payout.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Mandatory except for card payouts. Example: "SN", "CI", "GN".

customerId.description: Existing customer UUID. Takes precedence over customerObject when provided.

customerObject.description: Recipient details when no customerId is available.

phone.description: Recipient mobile number in international format. Example: "+221700000000".

transactionType.description: Purpose of the payout. Use "transfer" for standard disbursements.

paymentReason.description: Optional message sent to the recipient as the reason for the transfer.

merchantReference.description: Your internal reference for this payout.

merchant.description: Merchant authorization object. Required when your Bictorys account is configured to require a secret code for transfers.

secretCode.description: 4-digit merchant authorization code set in your Bictorys dashboard.

id.description: Unique identifier of the created payout transaction.

details.description: Bictorys error code. Examples: "E400-37: Secret code is missing", "E400-38: Insufficient balance", "E400-28: Money transfer is not authorized for this merchant".

gotchas: payment_type is a required query parameter specifying the recipient's mobile money provider. Append it to the URL: POST /pay/v1/payouts?payment_type=wave_money. Supported values: wave_money, orange_money, maxit, mtn_money, free_money, moov, mobicash, togocell, bictorys, card.

merchant.secretCode is a 4-digit code (not a password or API key) that the merchant sets in the Bictorys dashboard. If your account requires it, omitting it returns E400-37: Secret code is missing. If you have never set one, you will receive E400-34: User does not have a secret Code.

Money transfer must be explicitly enabled for your merchant account. If it is not, Bictorys returns E400-28: Money transfer is not authorized for this merchant. Contact Bictorys support to enable this capability.
Use the idempotency-key header (UUID format) on retry attempts to prevent duplicate payouts. Bictorys returns E400-0: Same Idempotency is passed if the same key is submitted twice successfully.
Sandbox base URL is https://api.test.bictorys.com — the production URL is https://api.bictorys.com. Sandbox payouts do not send real money.

Bulk payouts (create_bulk_payout) require a separate secret key obtained from Bictorys support — it is not available in the standard dashboard. Use this single-payout endpoint until bulk access is granted.
